events.description: A discussion on the history of unorthodox computing and AI, and its impact on modern technology and innovation.

events.description: A keynote lecture by Rebecca Solnit on public land, space, and discourse.

events.description: A informal chat or conversation session.

events.description: The first Clark Kerr Lecture discussing the evolving conditions of the American university.

events.description: Presentation on battery-free autonomous microrobots that can fly or drive using harvested energy, showcasing innovative engineering.

events.description: A lecture by Layal Ftouni on the concept of 'Palestine after the Human' in relation to impending freedom.

events.description: An event celebrating the legacy of June Jordan's Poetry for the People program.

events.description: A conversation with water defenders in Ecuador on community-led methods and collaboration across place and space.

events.title: Berkeley Book Chat with Winnie Wong
events.description: A book chat session featuring Winnie Wong.

events.title: CS Seminar: Productively Programming Accelerated Computing Systems
events.description: A computer science seminar on productively programming accelerated computing systems, with implications for tech development.

events.title: Archaeology by and for Robots? Publishing, Data Curation, and Asserting Humanity in the AI Ecosystem
events.description: A discussion on the role of robots and AI in archaeology, publishing, and data curation, touching upon emerging technologies.

events.description: A lecture by Professor Aron Rodrigue on a Ladino chronicle in the Ottoman Balkans.

events.description: A panel discussion on queer and trans perspectives within labor organizing.

events.description: A colloquium discussing immigration agents negotiating race and morality.
